summary: Completed comprehensive testing of German landing page overhaul. All major features successfully implemented and working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Customer logo opacity appears as 1.0 instead of expected 0.65 in computed styles, though code implementation is correct
design_issues.note: Animation and hover effects are working correctly, may be timing issue with computed style check
